Vendored Anime2.5DRig files
===========================

This directory vendors Anime2.5DRig runtime files from:

https://github.com/852wa/Anime2.5DRig

Upstream commit: d48825867acd081de22b0e7b5585bb562288796d
License: MIT
Copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 hakoniwa

Files:

- `rigger.js` is copied unmodified from `lib/rigger.js`.
- `LICENSE` is copied unmodified from the upstream repository.

The PSD assets from the upstream repository are not vendored. Keep them only in
`local-assets/` for local smoke testing.
